search_query: Extraction de règles de récupération basées sur la variabilité de la fréquence cardiaque et les techniques de récupération post-exercice
source_articles_used: Continuous heart rate variability monitoring, stress and recovery in doctors: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
Heart rate variability and overtraining in soccer players: A systematic review.
Influence of physical post-exercise recovery techniques on vagally-mediated heart rate variability: A systematic review and meta-analysis.

extracted_rules.condition: If Heart Rate Variability (HRV) reflects parasympathetic nervous system activity.
extracted_rules.action: Then it indicates a state of physiological recovery.

extracted_rules.condition: If Heart Rate Variability (HRV) reflects sympathetic nervous system activity.
extracted_rules.action: Then it indicates a state of physiological stress.

extracted_rules.condition: If alterations in linear Heart Rate Variability (HRV) parameters are observed in athletes (e.g., soccer players).
extracted_rules.action: Then assess for potential overtraining symptoms (OTS) linked to performance, fatigue, or recovery.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: N/A (qualitative, 'alterations' is not a specific value)

extracted_rules.rule_name: General Physical Recovery Techniques for PNS Reactivation
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Accelerates parasympathetic nervous system (PNS) reactivation, indexed by vagally-mediated HRV (vmHRV), specifically RMSSD (Hedges' g = 0.40, small to moderate positive effect).

extracted_rules.rule_name: Cold Water Immersion for Enhanced PNS Reactivation
extracted_rules.action: Apply cold water immersion (CWI) as a physical recovery technique.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Displays a moderate to large positive effect on RMSSD (Hedges' g = 0.75).

extracted_rules.rule_name: Recovery Techniques Effectiveness After Resistance Exercise
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Demonstrates a larger positive effect on RMSSD (Hedges' g = 0.69) compared to other exercise types.

extracted_rules.rule_name: Recovery Techniques Effectiveness After Cardiovascular Intermittent Exercise
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Demonstrates a positive effect on RMSSD (Hedges' g = 0.52).

extracted_rules.rule_name: Ineffectiveness of Physical Recovery Techniques After Cardiovascular Continuous Exercise
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Has no significant effect on RMSSD.
